---
title: "Research"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Work in Progress
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.9;">

Almeida, F. M. de S. — <em>Corn ethanol for Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) in the United States: Market and welfare effects</em>.
<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S. — <em>How much does it cost to reduce emissions in Nebraska? Evidence from corn and soybean production</em>.
<br>

Rocha Junior, A. B.; Almeida, F. M. de S. — <em>More land, less productivity? The relationship between deforestation and agriculture in Brazil</em>.
<br>

<!--Castro, N. R.; Almeida, F. M. de S.; Silva, R. P. — <em>Employment trends in Brazil’s soy industry</em>.
<br>-->

<!--Almeida, F. M. de S.; Machado, G. C.; Castro, N. R. — <em>Agricultural labor earnings gaps in Brazil</em>.
<br>-->

Lobo, G. D.; Rocha Junior, A. B.; Almeida, F. M. de S.; Danelon, A. F.; Almeida, A. N. — 
<em>Unsafe techniques and agrochemical poisoning: Evidence from Brazil</em>.
<br>

Lobo, G. D.; Almeida, F. M. de S.; Rocha Junior, A. B.; Danelon, A. F.; Almeida, A. N. — 
<em>Agrochemical poisoning and suicide attempts in rural Brazil: A spatial econometric approach</em>.

</p>

<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Papers Under Review
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.9;">

Castro, N. R.; Fachinelli, A. L.; Almeida, F. M. de S.; Silva, A. F. (2026) — 
<em>Agribusiness in São Paulo: Characterization and GDP performance (2010–2023)</em>.
<br>

Perrin, R.; Almeida, F. M. de S.; Fulginiti, L.; Dennis, E. (2026) — 
<em>Benchmark carbon intensity for Northern Plains corn and soybeans</em>.
<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S.; Perrin, R.; Fulginiti, L.; Dennis, E. (2026) — 
<em>Carbon intensity of co-products fed to beef cattle in the United States</em>.

</p>

<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Peer Reviewed Articles
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.9;">

Almeida, F. M. de S., & Spolador, H. F. S. (2024). 
<em>Determinants of corn total factor productivity in Brazil: A stochastic frontier analysis for the period from 1995 to 2017</em>. 
Revista de Economia e Sociologia Rural, 62, e287305. 
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1590/1806-9479.2023.287305"
   target="_blank"
   style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
[DOI]
</a>
<br>

Abdoulaye, A. M., Almeida, F. M. de S., Ervilha, G. T., & Lima, J. E. (2022). 
<em>Eficiência técnica das instituições de microfinanças na União Econômica e Monetária do Oeste Africano (UEMOA)</em>. 
Africana Studia, 38, 21–37. 
<a href="https://ojs.letras.up.pt/index.php/AfricanaStudia/article/view/13354/12059"
   target="_blank"
   style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
[Link]
</a>
<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S., Gomes, A. P., & de Freitas, A. F. (2021). 
<em>Social networks and efficiency in dairy farming: The case of the Program for the Development of Dairy Farming in Minas Gerais, Brazil</em>. 
Livestock Science, 244, 104401. 
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.livsci.2021.104401"
   target="_blank"
   style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
[DOI]
</a>
<br>

Simões, A. R. P., Bueno, N. P., Almeida, F. M. de S., Nicholson, C. F., Reis, J. D. D., & Leonel, F. D. P. (2020). 
<em>Public policies for enhancing diffusion of technology: A network analysis for a dairy farmer community in Minas Gerais, Brazil</em>. 
Revista Brasileira de Zootecnia, 49, e20190207. 
<a href="https://doi.org/10.37496/rbz4920190207"
   target="_blank"
   style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
[DOI]
</a>
<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S., & Rodrigues, C. T. (2019). 
<em>Evaluation of the quota policy at the Federal University of Viçosa</em>. 
Planejamento e Políticas Públicas, 53. 
<a href="http://www.ipea.gov.br/ppp/index.php/PPP/article/view/1020"
   target="_blank"
   style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
[Link]
</a>
<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S., Cassuce, F. C. D. C., & Cirino, J. F. (2016). 
<em>Academic performance at Universidade Federal de Viçosa</em>. 
Revista de Ciências Humanas, 16(1), 155–175. 
<a href="https://periodicos.ufv.br/revistacienciashumanas/article/view/2458"
   target="_blank"
   style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
[Link]
</a>

</p>

<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Book Chapters
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.9;">

Barros, G. S. de C., Castro, N. R., & Almeida, F. M. de S. (2020). 
<em>Direções do crescimento na agricultura</em>. 
In J. E. R. Vieira Filho & J. G. Gasques (Eds.), 
<em>Uma jornada pelos contrastes do Brasil: Cem anos do censo agropecuário</em> (pp. 51–66). 
Ipea. 
<a href="https://doi.org/10.38116/978-65-5635-011-0/cap3"
   target="_blank"
   style="color:#050505; text-decoration:none;">
[DOI]
</a>
<br>

<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Extension, Outreach, and Technical Reports
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.9;">
  
Almeida, F. M. de S.; Perrin, R. K.; Fulginiti, L. E.; Dennis, E. (2025) — 
<em>
  <a href="https://agecon.unl.edu/expected-carbon-intensity-ci-co-products-fed-beef-cattle-nebraska/"
     target="_blank"
     style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
     Carbon intensity of co-products fed to beef cattle in Nebraska
  </a>
</em>.
<br>

Perrin, R. K.; Almeida, F. M. de S.; Fulginiti, L. E.; Dennis, E. (2025) — 
<em>
  <a href="https://agecon.unl.edu/expected-carbon-intensity-ci-nebraska-corn-and-soybeans/"
     target="_blank"
     style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
     Expected carbon intensity of Nebraska corn and soybeans
  </a>
</em>.
<br>

Perrin, R. K.; Fulginiti, L. E.; Almeida, F. M. de S. (2024) — 
<em>
  <a href="https://digitalcommons.unl.edu/agecon_cornhusker/1244/"
     target="_blank"
     style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
     Will SAF turbocharge the corn ethanol market?
  </a>
</em> 
Cornhusker Economics.
<br>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.9;">

Quarterly technical reports on Brazilian agribusiness:

<ul style="margin:0.4rem 0 0.8rem 1.2rem;">

  <li>
    <a href="https://www.cepea.org.br/br/pib-do-agronegocio-brasileiro.aspx" 
       target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
      GDP
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <a href="https://www.cepea.org.br/br/mercado-de-trabalho-do-agronegocio.aspx" 
       target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
      Labor Market
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <a href="https://www.cepea.org.br/br/analises-ippa.aspx" 
       target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none; color:#050505;">
      Producer Price Index
    </a>
  </li>

</ul>

</p>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------
